Sourdough Bread, Croissants and Custom Cakes in Springfield

Example Bakery is a family bakery in Springfield that bakes fresh sourdough bread, croissants and custom cakes every morning.

We have baked by hand since 1998. Our doors open Tuesday through Sunday, from seven in the morning to seven at night. You can walk in for a warm loaf, or order online for same-day pickup at our counter. Everything is made in small batches on the day you buy it.

What we bake each morning

We keep the menu short so each item is done well. Here is what comes out of the oven each day:

  • Slow sourdough loaves made with a starter we feed daily.
  • Butter croissants, rolled and folded by hand.
  • Seasonal fruit tarts, made with fruit from local farms.
  • Custom cakes for birthdays and weddings, baked to order.

Our slow sourdough method

Good bread takes time, not shortcuts. We mix flour, water and salt, then let the dough rest overnight. The long, slow rise gives the crust a deep flavor. We shape each loaf by hand and bake it in a stone oven. To learn how this old method works, read the overview of sourdough on Wikipedia.

Ordering ahead of your visit

Fresh bread sells out fast on the weekend. An online order holds your loaf until you arrive. It also helps us plan the bake, so we waste less flour. If you have a question about an order, please call the shop and we will help. We answer the phone during shop hours.

Visiting the shop

You will find us at 1 Main Street, in the heart of downtown Springfield. We are open Tuesday through Sunday. There is seating by the window if you want to stay for a while. Parking is easy on the side streets, and a bus stops around the corner from our door.

About us Contact us
